def: Of or pertaining to sleep or dreams.The somnial magic superinducted on, without suspending, the activepowers of the mind. Coleridge.
Of or pertaining to the two sides of a central area or organ,or of a central axis; as, bilateral symmetry in animals, where thereis a similarity of parts on the right and left sides of the body.
To take in a wrong sense; to misunderstand. Locke.
A thick woolen fabric, watered or with embossed figures; --used in upholstery, for curtains, etc.
The temperature at which dew begins to form. It varies with thehumidity and temperature of the atmosphere.
An umbelliferous plant (Levisticum officinale), sometimes usedin medicine as an aromatic stimulant.
